title: Vice Chairman Wu Ling of the Qinhuangdao Federation of Industry and Commerce visited Tianhui Plastics Group for investigation and guidance
contentHtml:
On the afternoon of September 1, Vice Chairman Wu Ling of the Qinhuangdao Federation of Industry and Commerce visited Tianhui Plastics Group to conduct research and guidance. Chairman Huang Xuhong, the Qinhuangdao regional general agent of Hengshui Laobaigan, accompanied the meeting.

Zeng Shengwen, chairman of Tianhui Plastics Group, warmly received the guests. Mr. Zeng first introduced to the leaders of the Federation of Industry and Commerce and other leaders the distribution products, industry status of Tianhui Plastics Group and the emerging projects currently being prepared for the group’s operations. During the meeting, Zeng Shengwen, chairman of Tianhui Plastics Group, and Qinhuangdao regional general agent of Hengshui LaobaiganyellowXuhongChairmanConducted in-depth exchanges and discussions on the development history of the companies of both parties.
titleZh: 秦皇岛市工商联武玲副主席到访天晖塑料集团调研指导工作
contentHtmlZh:
9月1日下午，秦皇岛市工商联武玲副主席到访天晖塑料集团调研指导工作，衡水老白干秦皇岛区域总代理黄旭虹董事长陪同参会。

天晖塑料集团董事长曾胜文热情接待，曾总首先向工商联一行领导介绍天晖塑料集团经销产品、行业地位及目前集团运营筹备的新兴项目。会议期间天晖塑料集团董事长曾胜文与衡水老白干秦皇岛市区域总代理黄旭虹董事长就双方企业发展历程进行了深度交流探讨。
